steps.title: Find the main verb slot
steps.content: The clause "they ______ valuable items" needs a finite main verb. The previous sentence uses simple past with "exported," so the exchange action should also be in simple past.

steps.title: Reject nonfinite forms
steps.content: A is an infinitive, C is a participle, and D is a perfect participial phrase. None can serve as the main verb of the independent clause.

steps.title: Match the past action
steps.content: Obtained is a finite simple-past verb that completes the clause and matches "exported." The answer is B.
